biological_replicate: we investigated cellular uptake of these probes by live-cell confocal microscopy using the inherent fluorescence of the coumarin cage group.
technical_replicate: the workflow consisted of metabolic labeling, uncaging, and cross-linking photoreactions.
experimental_design: we performed pulse–trace experiments in which we liberated both lysoprobes by uncaging.
factor_value: we next studied the availability of lysoprobes to nonlysosomal proteins.
number_of_fractions: no additional bands appeared during 24 h of chase times.
number_of_samples: 1 biological replicate and 1 fraction = 1 total sample.
